calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Verified Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Nov-05-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: PETITIONER FIRST COLLATERAL SERVICES, INC.'S Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award.
APPEARANCES: Joshua E. Whitehair, Esq. of Severson & Werson 677-5631 for petitioner & moving party; no other appearances.
RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling - GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. Order and judgment signed in open court. (302/PJM) JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR #8600

Notice Of Hearing On Verified Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Oct-02-2007 Continued To Nov-05-07 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: PETITIONER FIRST COLLATERAL SERVICES, INC.'S Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award.
RULING: No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling - continued to November 5, 2007. All parties to provide courtesy copies reflecting new hearing date. (302/PJB/) JUDGE PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER CAROL KAREN, CSR 8189
